user_query: For fathers greek food filled day, please add a classic american breakfast option.

fields.name: Classic American Breakfast Plate
fields.short_description: A hearty traditional breakfast featuring scrambled eggs, crispy turkey bacon, whole-grain toast, and seasoned home fries.
fields.meal_suggestion: Scramble two large eggs with a splash of milk. Serve alongside two strips of crispy turkey bacon and a side of golden-brown cubed potatoes sautéed with onions and peppers. Accompany with a slice of toasted whole-grain bread and a small side of fresh seasonal fruit.
fields.nutrition_note: Provides high-quality protein from eggs and turkey bacon; complex carbohydrates from whole-grain toast and potatoes offer sustained energy. Using turkey bacon and olive oil reduces saturated fat compared to traditional pork-based versions.

insertion_point.reasoning: The user specifically requested a 'classic american breakfast' for the father's 'greek food filled day'. Day 1 is the only day in the context featuring a Greek-themed breakfast (Greek Protein Power Bowl, Shakshuka, Mediterranean Oatmeal). Position -1 appends this American option as an alternative to the Mediterranean-style choices.
